Campaigns, Ad Sets and Ads
Inside Your Ad Account
In Summary:
Campaigns - are where you set your objective. This can be to drive traffic, to
get video views, to promote an event, or to aim for conversions, etc.
Note: To keep your ad account clean, organise all your campaigns based along your funnel
steps. So if you are initially trying to drive hits to a blog post, all your split testing for this step
would take place under the SAME campaign (unless you are testing out a different objective).
Ad Sets - are where you set the budget, targeting and placement. You can test out
multiple ad sets and each will have its own budget.
Ads - are where you test different creatives
Mark As Complete
